user_query: The agent's tool-calling loop in apps/worker/src/agent/runner.ts has a bug where it never stops: after the model returns a stop_reason of 'end_turn' with no tool calls, the loop continues and sends an empty tool_results array back to the model, causing an infinite back-and-forth. Read the runner, identify the loop termination condition, fix it so the loop exits on 'end_turn' with no pending tool calls, then run the tests to confirm the fix. Also check if apps/worker/src/agent/runner.test.ts has a test for this case and add one if it's missing.
